overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration through a foggy, neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character walks from a main boulevard through underpasses, narrow back alleys with pink neon lighting, a market area with food vendors, and ascends to an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city boulevard with towering neon billboards

events.description: black SUV drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet city street observing the neon-lit skyscrapers and foggy atmosphere

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows towering above
large red neon sign with hotel text mounted on building facade
massive digital screen displaying animated cartoon character advertisement
metal trash receptacles lined along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city boulevard at night, shrouded in fog. The player walks forward past trash cans while a black SUV crosses the intersection. Towering cyberpunk skyscrapers with neon signage dominate the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass transitioning to narrow back alley

events.description: turns left off main road into narrow alley with intense pink neon lighting
ambient lighting shifts to dominant magenta pink glow from neon strips

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrow alleyway, leaving the main street behind

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the road ahead
flight of concrete stairs leading upward on the left side
intense magenta pink neon light strips illuminating the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The player moves under a massive highway overpass, the environment becoming darker and more enclosed. Turning left into a narrow alley, the scene is bathed in intense magenta pink neon light from strips ahead, marking a distinct visual shift from the main boulevard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with steam vents and parked vehicles

events.description: passing through area with thick steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow industrial alley with steam and pink lighting

entered.detail: industrial building with corrugated metal walls and small windows
several cars parked in the open lot area ahead
thick white steam rising from vents on the wet ground creating mist

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the narrow industrial back alley, the player passes corrugated metal buildings and parked cars. Thick steam rises from ground vents, mixing with the pink neon glow. The environment feels enclosed and atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: enters narrow market alley with food stalls and red vertical banners

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls and outdoor seating in the narrow market passage

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting at food stall under the red banner

entered.detail: food stall with counter, cooking equipment and illuminated menu
tall red fabric banners with white text and logos hanging from stall
plastic chairs and tables under white umbrellas for outdoor dining
staircase leading upward visible at the end of the alley
tall skyscrapers visible in the distance at the end of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow market alley with a ramen food stall on the right marked by red vertical banners. Plastic outdoor furniture sits under umbrellas, and a vendor is seated at the stall. The alley opens slightly to show skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: begins ascending concrete staircase to upper pedestrian level
reaches top of stairs entering open elevated pedestrian bridge with city views

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to elevated walkway then continuing forward on the bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with blue painted railings leading upward
blue metal safety railings along the sides of the pedestrian bridge
large white billboard displaying NICOLA text and portrait
vending machine with blue and yellow coloring on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete staircase to an elevated pedestrian walkway, passing a pedestrian coming down. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to a panoramic cityscape with massive digital billboards including one for NICOLA. The walkway features blue railings and a vending machine as the player continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, foggy city boulevard into the claustrophobic depths of neon-lit alleys before ascending to a panoramic urban overlook. It begins on a broad futuristic street under a skyline of towering skyscrapers, moving past trash cans and crossing traffic as the camera advances through the mist. As the player passes under a massive highway overpass, the environment darkens and shifts abruptly into a narrow industrial alley bathed in intense magenta pink neon and thick rising steam. The scene then transitions into a cramped market area featuring a ramen stall with red banners and outdoor furniture, before turning toward a concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends to an elevated pedestrian walkway, where the enclosed alleyways give way to a vast cityscape dominated by massive digital billboards and blue railings.
